title: Expose the direct playback component in Settings
forbidden_changes: Changing component manifest trust or integrity verification
Using FFmpeg as the interactive note video player
Hiding unavailable playback capability from the user
Adding interactive hit areas smaller than 40 by 40 pixels
deliverables: Visible mpv-tools card in Settings plugins
Clear direct-playback and timestamp-seek capability labels
Responsive plugin card and action layout
Browser audit fixture covering playback component visibility
acceptance_tests: Every runtime component returned by components.list is visible in Settings plugins
mpv-tools is labelled as the local video player and exposes an install action when absent
The plugin page remains free of overlap from 900 through 1920 CSS pixels
Svelte check and production frontend build complete with zero errors and zero warnings
Existing component integrity and Rust regression tests remain compatible
security_requirements: Installation must continue through the existing native component verifier
No component download URL or digest may be overridden by frontend input
